reviews.review_description: This is an ideal tour for those who'd like to see many historical sites coupled with interesting facts but lack the ability to get there. It's much cheaper than traveling there in person as well. There are so many locations to see, and I enjoy that the map is shown indicating the distance between each location.
The tour consists of 360 images of locations and was very informative. It's like being there, but without all the hassle of travel.

This app offers pictures of amazing locations. However, I felt it was lacking for a VR experience. Basically they have taken a picture of the location, and you’re able to see the location while they give a quick history lesson on the picture. But you’re not able to walk around at the location or interact with anything there. ￼Not what I expected from a VR tour.
